personaSearch.placeholder: Khangela ngegama, ubungcali, okanye uchaze iimpawu zakho (umzekelo, intloko ebuhlungu, ixhala)
personaSearch.searchSuggestions: Zama ukukhangela: intloko, ixhala, intlungu, ukulala, isifo seswekile, njl.

configurator.title: Qalisa Uthethwano olutsha lwezeMpilo
configurator.subtitle: Khetha kwiqela lakho lezempilo le-AI
configurator.noOtherSpecialists: Azikho ezinye iingcaphephe kwiqela lakho. Unokuncokola ne-AI yeNgcali yezeMpilo uCarol okanye

carolNote.title: Qaphela kwi-AI yeNgcali yeMpilo kaCarol yokuthatha inxaxheba:
carolNote.ruleA: A. Ingcali yezempilo ye-AI uCarol ifakiwe ukuba i-0 okanye i-2 + ezinye iingcali zikhethwa kwiqela lakho.
carolNote.ruleB: B. Ingcali yezempilo ye-AI uCarol ayiqukwanga ukuba kuphela i-1 enye ingcali ekhethiweyo kwiqela lakho.

team.addTeamMembersInstruction: Yongeza amalungu eqela ngokucofa kwikhadi elisekunene.
team.maxTeamSizeNote: Ubuninzi babacebisi be-AI bongezwa kwiqela lakho. Ungalitshintsha iqela lakho nangaliphi na ixesha, kodwa hayi ngexesha lokubonisana.
team.manageTeamTitle: Lawula iQela lam lezeMpilo le-AI (Ubuninzi {{max}} IiNgcali)
team.removeSpecialistToUseTeamBuilder: Nceda ususe ubuncinane ingcali enye ukuba isebenzise iingcebiso zesakhiwo seqela leNgcali yezeMpilo ye-AI yeCarol
team.aileenCarolRecommendTeam: Yiba neNgcali yezeMpilo ye-AI uCarol icebisa iqela lakho lezempilo
team.teamFullRemoveToUseBuilder: Iqela lakho ligcwele. Nceda ususe ubuncinane ingcali enye ukusebenzisa isakhiwo seqela le-AI.
team.teamEmptyAddBelow: Iqela lakho lengcali alinanto. Yongeza iingcaphephe ngezantsi.
team.teamFullRemoveMember: Iqela lakho ligcwele (Ubuninzi {{max}} iingcaphephe). Nceda ususe ilungu ukuba ungathanda ukongeza ingcali eyahlukileyo.
team.addMembersClickCard: Yongeza amalungu eqela ngokucofa kwikhadi kwindawo ephambili
team.noMatchingSpecialists: Azikho iingcaphephe ezidibanayo ezifunyenweyo kwiingcebiso ze-AI. Ungazama kwakhona okanye wakhe iqela lakho ngesandla.
team.medicalDisclaimerText: Eli qonga libonelela ngeengcebiso zempilo kunye nesikhokelo kodwa alinakuthatha indawo yokhathalelo lwempilo lobuchwephesha. Soloko udibana nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo kwiimeko ezingxamisekileyo okanye iinkxalabo ezinzulu zempilo.
team.clickToAddInstruction: Cofa kwikhadi ukuze ungeze kwiqela lakho ({{current}}/{{max}} ekhethiwe). Iingcali ezikhethiweyo zibonisa ibheji "Ekhethiweyo".
team.teamFullInstruction: Iqela lakho ligcwele. Susa ilungu ukongeza ingcali eyahlukileyo.
team.allSpecialistsAdded: Zonke iingcaphephe ezikhoyo zongezwe kwiqela lakho.
team.addMembersInstruction: Yongeza amalungu eqela ngokucofa kwikhadi elisekunene.

specialistCategories.allergiesImmuneSystem: Ukwaliwa kunye neNkqubo yoKhuseleko lwamajoni omzimba

dialogs.logoutMessage: Ngoku ukwindibano yokubonisana. Ukuloga ngaphandle kuya kuyiphelisa. Ingaba ungathanda ukwenza ntoni?
dialogs.deleteMessage: Esi senzo asinakuphinda singenziwa. Ingaba uqinisekile?
dialogs.summarizeFirst: Ngaba ungathanda ukufumana isishwankathelo phambi kokuba uphume?
dialogs.doneAlreadyMessage: Silapha nanini na usifuna. Kuze kube ngoko, yiba nempilo, wonwabe!
dialogs.multiDeleteConfirmation: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima {{count}} iingcebiso ezikhethiweyo? Esi senzo asinakuphinda singenziwa.
dialogs.noAdvisersToAdd: Bonke abacebisi bakho bezempilo be-AI abakhethiweyo sele bekule ngxoxo, okanye uluhlu lwakho alunanto (ngaphandle kwabathathi-nxaxheba bangoku).

longRecording.title: Ukurekhoda Okude Kumisiwe
longRecording.message: Asikwazi ukurekhoda ngaphezulu kwemizuzwana engama-30 ngaphandle kokuyithumela. Ingaba ungathanda ukwenza ntoni?

dialogs.generatingSummary: Nceda ulinde ngelixa sisenza isishwankathelo sokubonisana...
dialogs.finishConsultationMessage: Oku kuya kuphelisa iseshoni yencoko esebenzayo. Ingaba uqinisekile?
dialogs.moreInfoMessage: Le ncoko imfutshane kakhulu ukuba ivelise isishwankathelo esinentsingiselo okanye uluvo olwahlukileyo. Nceda uqhubeke nengxoxo de ube namagama angama-150 omxholo wencoko.
dialogs.aiHealthSpecialist: Ingcali yakho yezempilo engundoqo kunye nokuba sempilweni kwe-AI

shortConv.title: Iphelile Incoko
shortConv.messageLine1: Yaphela incoko. Ifutshane kakhulu ukuyigcina, kodwa yiza kwakhona kwakamsinyane.
shortConv.messageLine2: Kude kube ngoko, yiba sempilweni, wonwabe.

errors.connectionError: Impazamo yoqhagamshelwano. Nceda ujonge uqhagamshelo lwe-intanethi yakho.
errors.serverError: Impazamo yeseva. Nceda uzame kwakhona mva.
errors.emailAlreadyTaken: Le imeyile sele ithathiwe. Nceda uzame enye okanye ungene.
errors.failedToSaveProfile: Ayiphumelelanga ukugcina inkangeleko yesimo. Nceda zama kwakhona.
errors.teamIsFull: Iqela lakho ligcwele (Ubuninzi {{max}} iingcaphephe). Nceda ususe ilungu ukuba ungathanda ukongeza ingcali eyahlukileyo.
errors.selectOneSpecialist: Nceda ukhethe ingcali enye kuphela yothethwano lwabucala.
errors.contactErrorMessage: Kwenzeke imposiso xa kuthunyelwa umyalezo wakho. Nceda uzame kwakhona kamva okanye

welcome.title: Wamkelekile kwiVirtualMD.app
welcome.subtitle: Qala uthethwano lwakho lwezempilo olulolwakho
welcome.description: Khetha kwiqela lethu labacebisi bezempilo abanikwe amandla nge-AI ukuze ufumane ulwazi olulolwakho lwempilo kunye nesikhokelo.
welcome.greeting: Molo, {{igama lomsebenzisi}}. Ndiyavuya ukubona! Iqela lakho leVirtualMD lilungele 24/7 ukunceda...
welcome.aileenCarolIntro: Molo, NdiyiNgcali yezeMpilo ye-AI uAileen Carol. Ndingakunceda ngantoni namhlanje?
welcome.persona_welcome_message: Molo, ndilapha ukuze ndikuncede ngeemfuno zakho zempilo kunye nokuba sempilweni. Ndingakunceda ngantoni namhlanje?

imageUpload.dragAndDrop: Tsala kwaye uwise imifanekiso apha, okanye cofa ukukhetha

carolMessages.teamFull: {{igama}}, iqela lakho lizele! Ungaqala ukubonisana neqela lakho langoku okanye ususe amanye amalungu ukuze ufumane iingcebiso ezintsha.
carolMessages.helpBuild: {{igama}}, ndingathanda ukukunceda wakhe iqela lakho lezempilo eligqibeleleyo! Khawutsho ubekwa yintoni apha namhlanje.

carolGreeting.helpBuild: Molo {{igama}}! Ndiza kukunceda wakhe iqela lakho lezempilo eligqibeleleyo.

mobileTeamBuilder.tellUsWhy: Sixelele ukuba kutheni ulapha namhlanje ukuze senze iqela lakho lezempilo eligqibeleleyo.
mobileTeamBuilder.placeholder: Chaza iinkxalabo zempilo yakho, iimpawu, okanye into ongathanda ukuncedwa ngayo...

fileUpload.clickToUpload: Cofa ukulayisha ifayile (Ungalahla iifayile kwingxoxo ngokunjalo)

profile.healthInfoTooltip: Nceda ubhale okanye udwelise amayeza, uxilongo, izongezo kunye nezinye izinto ezibalulekileyo ezinxulumene nempilo ngawe.

imageContext.cropPromotionError: Ayiphumelelanga ukuthumela kunye nokongeza umfanekiso osondeziweyo. Jonga i-console.
imageContext.noActiveZoom: Akukho kwandisa okusebenzayo ukuthumela. Nceda ukhethe indawo emfanekisweni.
imageContext.noImages: Akukho mifanekiso kumxholo. Layisha umfanekiso ukuze uqalise.
imageContext.allHidden: Yonke imifanekiso ifihliwe okwangoku. Cofa i-thumbnail kwiheda ukubonisa umfanekiso.
imageContext.dragToZoom: Cofa kwaye utsale umfanekiso ongentla ukuze ukhethe indawo entsha yokwandisa.

mobileWelcome.aileenCarolIntro: Ndingu-AI Aileen Carol, ingcali yakho yezempilo esisiseko. Ndijonge phambili ukukwazi. Ndiphethe iqela lakho leVirtualMD.app AI yeengcali zempilo. Sikulungele ukunceda 24/7...
mobileWelcome.aiTeamBuilder: Ingcali yezempilo ye-AI uCarol ikunceda ukhethe iqela lakho

sidebarHeader.aileenCarolTeamBuilder: Ingcali yezempilo uCarol inceda ukwakha iqela lakho.

encyclopedia.title: VirtualMD.app Encyclopedia
encyclopedia.loadingMessage: Sikwenzela uphando olunzulu ngesi sihloko. Nceda ulinde imizuzwana embalwa ngempendulo yakho.
encyclopedia.longWaitMessage: Oku kungathatha imizuzu embalwa ukufumana iimpendulo ezineenkcukacha.
encyclopedia.emptyState: Ngenisa umbuzo ngasentla ukukhangela iVirtualMD.app Encyclopedia.

input.typeOrSpeakPlaceholder:
Chwetheza okanye uthethe umyalezo wakho...
Cofa u-Enter okanye ucofe ▷ ukuthumela.
input.typePlaceholder:
Chwetheza umyalezo apha...
Cofa u-Enter okanye ucofe ▷ ukuthumela.
input.startTypingMessage: Qala ukuchwetheza umyalezo wakho kwibhokisi engezantsi ukuqalisa ukubonisana kwakho.

quickActions.whatShouldIDo: Ngokusekelwe kuyo yonke into esiyithethileyo, kufuneka ndenze ntoni ngoku? Nceda unikeze iingcebiso ezicacileyo, ezinokuthathwa.
quickActions.requestSummary: Nceda unikeze isishwankathelo esibanzi sencoko yethu ukuza kuthi ga ngoku, kubandakanywa amanqaku aphambili ekuxoxwe ngawo, iingcebiso ezenziweyo, kunye namanyathelo alandelayo.

camera.accessDenied: Ufikelelo lwekhamera lwaliwe. Nceda vumela ufikelelo lwekhamera kwiisethingi zebrawuza yakho.

specialistPanel.guidanceSingle: Khetha iNgcali ye-AI ibe nye kuthethwano lwabucala:
specialistPanel.guidanceMulti: Ingcali yezempilo ye-AI uCarol iya kuhlala ifakiwe. Khetha abacebisi bezempilo be-AI abongezelelweyo:
specialistPanel.warningSelectOne: Nceda ukhethe ingcali enye kuphela yothethwano lwabucala.
specialistPanel.noSpecialistsAvailable: Akukho ngcaphephe ze-AI zifumanekayo ngoku ukuze kudityanwe nabucala.
specialistPanel.noAdvisersAvailable: Akukho bacebisi bezempilo bongezelelweyo be-AI abakhoyo.

sidebarFooter.disclaimerText: I-VirtualMD.app izama ukuchaneka. Nangona kunjalo, oku kunye nayiphi na inkonzo esekelwe kwi-AI inokunika ulwazi olungachanekanga. Soloko udibana nengcali yokhathalelo lwempilo yabantu.
sidebarFooter.emergencyText: Tsalela umnxeba ku-911 xa ufuna uncedo lwezonyango.

account.title: Iisetingi ze-akhawunti
account.description: Ukusuka apha unokucima ngokusisigxina iakhawunti yakho yeVirtualMD.app. Eli nyathelo lisusa iprofayile yakho kunye nazo zonke iingcebiso.
account.confirmDeleteText: Esi senzo asinakuguqulwa. Lonke ulwazi lweprofayile yakho, ukubonisana, kunye neefayile ziya kususwa ngokusisigxina. Uqinisekile ufuna ukuqhubeka?

mobileRouter.logInToView: Ngena ukuze ujonge iincoko zakho okanye uqale entsha.

chat.logInToView: Ngena ukuze ujonge iincoko zakho okanye uqale entsha.

child.title: Umntwana wam uyagula
child.subtitle: Ukhathalelo lwabantwana oluchwephesha xa ulufuna kakhulu
child.initialMessage: Ndingu-AI Aileen Carol, uMcebisi wakho wezeMpilo oNgcono. Ndiyayazi indlela anokuba nexhala ngayo umntwana ogulayo. Ndixelele ukuba kuqhubeka ntoni.  Qaphela: Ndiyi-AI, hayi umntu; ingcebiso yam inokuba ayilunganga-qinisekisa ngegcisa lezempilo lomntu eliqeqeshiweyo.

sleep.title: Andikwazi kulala!
sleep.subtitle: Buyisela ubusuku bakho, uguqule imihla yakho
sleep.initialMessage: Ndingu-AI Aileen Carol, uMcebisi wakho wezeMpilo weVirtual, kunye neengcali zokulala ze-AIs Benjamin Stein (Psychiatry) kunye ne-AI Alice Chen (i-Neurology). Yabelana ngemiceli mngeni yakho yokulala ukuze sikuncede. Qaphela: Sizi-AIS, asingobantu; ingcebiso yethu inokuba ayilunganga-qinisekisa ngengcali yezempilo eqeqeshiweyo (yomntu).

nutrition.title: Isondlo sokuphila
nutrition.subtitle: Yongeza amandla akho, impilo entle, kunye nempilo yezesondo ngokutya
nutrition.initialMessage: Ndingu-AI u-Aileen Carol, uMcebisi wakho wezeMpilo onguVimbayo, apha neqela lakho- AI Angelica Fordham (isondlo), unyango lwezesondo u-AI uRachel Levy, kunye ne-AI yase-Afrika ye-Herbalist u-Amina Okufur. Uziva njani namhlanje? Qaphela: Siyi-AI, asingobantu; Ingcebiso inokuba ayilunganga-qinisekisa ngegcisa lezempilo eliqeqeshiweyo.

uploadFeatures.title: Uxwebhu kunye neMifanekiso yokuLayishwa kweMifanekiso
uploadFeatures.description: Iqonga lethu libonelela ngamaxwebhu anamandla kunye nobuchule bokuhlalutya imifanekiso apho unako:
uploadFeatures.benefit1: Layisha amaxwebhu ezempilo, iingxelo zelebhu, kunye nemifanekiso
uploadFeatures.benefit2: Sondeza kwiindawo ezithile ukuze ufumane uhlalutyo oluneenkcukacha
uploadFeatures.benefit3: Ngaba abacebisi bethu bezempilo be-AI bavavanye kwaye baxoxe ngamaxwebhu akho
uploadFeatures.benefit4: Thatha iifoto ngqo kwikhamera yakho ukuze ubonisane ngokukhawuleza
uploadFeatures.registeredOnly: Ezi mpawu zikhethekileyo ziyafumaneka kubasebenzisi ababhalisiweyo.
